scripts.dev: concurrently -n customer,admin,staff -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=@sushimei/customer" "npm run dev --workspace=@sushimei/admin" "npm run dev --workspace=@sushimei/staff"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@sushimei/customer && npm run build --workspace=@sushimei/admin && npm run build --workspace=@sushimei/staff
scripts.start: concurrently -n customer,admin,staff -c blue,green,yellow "npm run start --workspace=@sushimei/customer" "npm run start --workspace=@sushimei/admin" "npm run start --workspace=@sushimei/staff"
